permits.description: Gut renovation of Existing Interior and Exterior of building. Dig out existing foundation approx. 2' to add ceiling height to basement. Existing interior walls to remain. Install new roof, siding, windows and doors.
permits.score_reasons: high cost ($507,000); keyword: gut; minor: siding

llm_assessment.reasoning: The $507,000 full gut renovation of both the interior and exterior, including foundation work to increase ceiling height, indicates a total property overhaul consistent with preparing a home for market.
